title: Jean Mrha
compiled_truth: Jean Mrha is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-18), Jean Mrha sent 108 and received 517 emails, totalling 625 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (74), [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (18), [Tammie Schoppe](people/tammie-schoppe) (15), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (12), [Brian Redmond](people/brian-redmond) (10). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, jean, personal.
